zh.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Greasley是William Gresley的兒子，於大約1172年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德拉可洛福。他和Margaret Somerville至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1240年在英國德比夏爾莫頓享年69歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾莫頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Greasley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name, usually from Greasley (Notts) but possibly also from Gresley (Derbys). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2), particularly the Lancs examples.

2 Norman, English: nickname, either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’. In early forms, the nickname has sometimes been confused with the place-name in (1). Compare Le Gresley in Jersey and Greslé, Grêlé in France.

variants.name: Gridley
meanings: variant of Greasley, either a habitational name from Greasley in Nottinghamshire (but possibly also from Gresley in Derbyshire), or a nickname either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’.

perhaps from Middle English greithli, gritheli ‘good, pleasant, noble’ (Old Norse greithligr), the source of modern northern dialect gradely ‘decent, honest, good-looking, kind’. In the absence of medieval surname forms this is conjectural.
English:

variants.name: Graley
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Greasley, a habitational name from any of the places so called in Nottinghamshire or Derbyshire, or a nickname either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’.
Possibly an Americanized form of German   Greulich  .
Irish: variant of Greally, from Mag Raoghallaigh ‘son of Raoghallach’, a variant of Raghailleach; compare O'Reilly .

variants.name: Grealey
meanings: 1 Irish: from Mag Raoghallaigh, see Greally .
2  English:  see  Greasley   and   Graley  .

variants.name: Gresly
meanings: English:  see  Greasley  .

variants.name: Grisley
meanings: English:  see  Greasley  .

variants.name: Le Gresley
meanings: Norman: nickname, either from Old French le greslet ‘the one marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French le greslet, le gresli ‘the thin or slim (one)’. Compare English Greasley (2).

variants.name: Gresley
meanings: English:  see  Greasley  .

variants.name: Grayley
meanings: 1 Irish: from Mag Raoghallaigh, see Greally .
2  English:  see  Greasley   and   Graley  .

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Greasley was born about 1172, in Drakelow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of William Gresley. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Margaret Somerville. He died in 1240, in Morton, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Morton, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Greasley est né environ 1172, à Drakelow, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de William Gresley. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Margaret Somerville. Il est décédé en 1240, à Morton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Morton, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Greasley wurde um 1172 in Drakelow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von William Gresley geboren. Er hatte mit Margaret Somerville mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1240 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Morton, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Morton, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Greasley è nato il circa 1172 nel Drakelow, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di William Gresley. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Margaret Somerville. Morì nel 1240, nel Morton, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Morton, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Greasleyは約1172年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアドラケロウでWilliam Gresleyの息子として生まれた。彼はMargaret Somervilleとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1240年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアモートンで69歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアモートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Greasley(은)는 대략 1172년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 드라켈로에서 William Gresley의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Margaret Somerville(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1240년 영국 더비실르 모르턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 모르턴에 묻혔다.

Drakelowe, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Greasley nasceu aproximadamente 1172, em Drakelow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de William Gresley. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Margaret Somerville. Ele faleceu em 1240, em Morton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Morton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Greasley родился около 1172 г. в местности дрекелоу, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали William Gresley. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Margaret Somerville. Он умер в 1240 г. в местности мортон, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности мортон, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Greasley nació aproximadamente 1172, en Drakelow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de William Gresley. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Margaret Somerville. Murió en 1240, en Morton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Morton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
